testcase.name: test_can_navigate_to_autocomplete

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]") resolved to 2 elements: 1) Autocomplete aka get_by_label("Components").get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete") 2) Autocomplete aka get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete").nth(1) Call log: - waiting for locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]")

testcase.failure: tests/consolidated/test_consolidated.py:32: in test_can_navigate_to_autocomplete page.locator('xpath=//a[contains(text(), "Autocomplete")]').click() ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:15631: in click self._sync( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:162: in click return await self._frame._click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:566: in _click await self._channel.send("click", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]") resolved to 2 elements: E 1) Autocomplete aka get_by_label("Components").get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete") E 2) Autocomplete aka get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete").nth(1) E E Call log: E - waiting for locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]")

testcase.name: test_navigation_to_form

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 'https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/' Actual value: https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/form Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/form"

testcase.failure: tests/page_1/test_page_1.py:29: in test_navigation_to_form expect(page).to_have_url(PAGE_1_URL) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 'https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/' E Actual value: https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/form E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E 9 × unexpected value "https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/form"

testcase.name: test_interactive_element_link

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 'https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/' Actual value: https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/autocomplete Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/autocomplete"

testcase.failure: tests/page_1/test_page_1.py:47: in test_interactive_element_link expect(page).to_have_url(PAGE_1_URL) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 'https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/' E Actual value: https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/autocomplete E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E 9 × unexpected value "https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/autocomplete"

testcase.name: test_page_15_open_new_tab

failure.message: AttributeError: 'PageAssertions' object has no attribute 'not_to_be_null'. Did you mean: 'not_to_have_url'?

testcase.failure: tests/page_15/test_page_15.py:33: in test_page_15_open_new_tab expect(new_tab).not_to_be_null() E AttributeError: 'PageAssertions' object has no attribute 'not_to_be_null'. Did you mean: 'not_to_have_url'?

testcase.name: test_page_16_thanks_text_presence

failure.message:
AssertionError: Locator expected to have text 'Thanks for submitting your form' Actual value:
Formy
Form
Components
Autocomplete Buttons Checkbox Datepicker Drag and Drop Dropdown Enabled and disabled elements File Upload Key and Mouse Press Modal Page Scroll Radio Button Switch Window Complete Web Form
Thanks for submitting your form
The form was successfully submitted!
Call log: - Expect "to_have_text" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("body") 19 × locator resolved to <body>…</body> - unexpected value "
Formy
Form
Components
Autocomplete Buttons Checkbox Datepicker Drag and Drop Dropdown Enabled and disabled elements File Upload Key and Mouse Press Modal Page Scroll Radio Button Switch Window Complete Web Form
Thanks for submitting your form
The form was successfully submitted!
"

testcase.failure: tests/page_16/test_page_16.py:45: in test_page_16_thanks_text_presence expect(page.locator('body')).to_have_text("Thanks for submitting your form", timeout=15000) E AssertionError: Locator expected to have text 'Thanks for submitting your form' E Actual value: E E E Formy E E E E E E E Form E E E E Components E E E Autocomplete E Buttons E Checkbox E Datepicker E Drag and Drop E Dropdown E Enabled and disabled elements E File Upload E Key and Mouse Press E Modal E Page Scroll E Radio Button E Switch Window E Complete Web Form E E E E E E E Thanks for submitting your form E E E E The form was successfully submitted! E E E E E E E E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_text" with timeout 15000ms E - waiting for locator("body") E 19 × locator resolved to <body>…</body> E - unexpected value " E E E Formy E E E E E E E Form E E E E Components E E E Autocomplete E Buttons E Checkbox E Datepicker E Drag and Drop E Dropdown E Enabled and disabled elements E File Upload E Key and Mouse Press E Modal E Page Scroll E Radio Button E Switch Window E Complete Web Form E E E E E E E Thanks for submitting your form E E E E The form was successfully submitted! E E E E E E E "

testcase.name: test_page_2_navigation_to_form

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('#logo')". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? Call log: - waiting for page.locator('#logo')

testcase.failure: tests/page_2/test_page_2.py:17: in test_page_2_navigation_to_form page.locator("page.locator('#logo')").click() ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:15631: in click self._sync( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:162: in click return await self._frame._click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:566: in _click await self._channel.send("click", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('#logo')". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? E Call log: E - waiting for page.locator('#logo')

testcase.name: test_page_2_fill_and_submit_form

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.fill: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('#first-name')". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? Call log: - waiting for page.locator('#first-name')

testcase.failure: tests/page_2/test_page_2.py:36: in test_page_2_fill_and_submit_form page.locator("page.locator('#first-name')").fill("John") ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:15983: in fill self._sync( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:215: in fill return await self._frame.fill(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:607: in fill await self._fill(**locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:619: in _fill await self._channel.send("fill", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.fill: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('#first-name')". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? E Call log: E - waiting for page.locator('#first-name')

testcase.name: test_dropdown_interaction
testcase.failure: tests/page_8/test_page_8.py:34: in test_dropdown_interaction expect(page.locator('xpath=//a[text()="Option 1"]').is_visible()).to_be_visible(timeout=10000) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/__init__.py:143: in __call__ raise ValueError(f"Unsupported type: {type(actual)}") E ValueError: Unsupported type: <class 'bool'>
